mnemonics: Every Cloud Drifts Swiftly Upwards (ECDSM) - Elasticity, Cloud, Distributed Systems, Scalability, Ubiquitous access
keyPoints: Focuses on the paradigm shift to utility computing and service-oriented architectures.
Emphasizes the critical challenges of resource management, scalability, and energy efficiency in large-scale distributed systems.
Discusses the architectural principles and core technologies that enable cloud computing, such as virtualization and web services.
commonMistakes: Confusing cloud computing with simple client-server models or traditional grid computing, missing the on-demand, elastic, and metered service aspects.
Overlooking the significant challenges related to security, data privacy, and reliability that are central to the discussion of cloud adoption.
